name: Rebuilding Oath Court
identity: A renewal oath chamber in Ashforge Citadel that makes the settlement’s public order and local priorities tangible in scene play.
what_happens_here: People gather here to resolve, negotiate, pray, record, unload, study, or complain depending on the site’s civic role.
visible_tension: The site currently carries visible pressure from one of Ashforge Citadel’s standing social or institutional conflicts.
